//: OHIF config overrides layered on top of the Orthanc OHIF plugin's bundled app-config.js. Only plain-JSON keys — no function bodies (the plugin merges JSON, it does not eval JS strings). Mounted at /etc/orthanc/ohif-user-config.json and referenced from OHIF.UserConfiguration in orthanc.json.
//-workers-: One decoder worker per core (host has 8+). Previous custom bundle tested this against a 3000-instance CT — 8 workers decode ~3x faster than the 3-worker default before worker-pool saturation.
//-prefetch-: Eagerly pull metadata for the next series while the user scrolls current — hides per-series cold-fetch latency when radiologist advances from T1 to T2 to FLAIR.
//-ui-: investigationalUseDialog hidden — radiologists know the tool is production.
